body:
## Rationale

Lick pages are our **proven top-performing GA4 format** — Igor Cavalera lick pages rank in the top-2 organic GA4 pages after the homepage and /drummers hub. Batches 1-8 cover: Igor, Kollias, Flo, Jaska, Hoglan, Lombardo, Haake, Menza, Reinert, Greiner, Jordison, Lars, Danny Carey, Brann, Jay Weinberg, Nicko McBrain, Pete Sandoval, Portnoy, Halpern, Martin Lopez, Eloy, Mazurkiewicz.

**Chris Adler, Art Cruz, and Alex Bent are all absent from batches 1-8.** This batch is additionally well-timed because:
- LoG succession content is building (Sacrament ✅, Wrath #2412 in queue) → Adler/Cruz narrative arc is active
- Trivium content is building (Shogun ✅, Ascendancy #2324, In Waves #2422, Vengeance Falls #2441) → Alex Bent lick pages cross-link naturally

## Batch scope

**9 lick pages + 3 LLM companion files:**

### Chris Adler (3 lick pages)
1. `chris-adler-walk-drum-setup` — iconic shuffle groove from "Walk with Me in Hell" (Sacrament, 2006)
2. `chris-adler-redneck-drum-setup` — southern metal groove from "Redneck" (Sacrament, 2006) — Grammy-winning track
3. `chris-adler-contractor-drum-setup` — polyrhythmic groove from "The Contractor" (Resolution, 2012)

### Art Cruz (3 lick pages)
1. `art-cruz-ghost-walking-drum-setup` — Cruz's first studio LoG recording (Sturm und Drang, 2015)
2. `art-cruz-laid-to-rest-drum-setup` — Cruz live interpretation of classic Adler groove
3. `art-cruz-new-colossal-hate-drum-setup` — from Omens (2022), Cruz's defining creative statement

### Alex Bent (3 lick pages)
1. `alex-bent-beyond-oblivion-drum-setup` — from The Sin and the Sentence (2017), Bent's debut Trivium lick
2. `alex-bent-seat-of-the-soul-drum-setup` — polyrhythmic pattern from What the Dead Men Say (2020)
3. `alex-bent-a-crisis-of-revelation-drum-setup` — from In the Court of the Dragon (2021)

## Files to touch

Per-drummer lick data files (following the modular pattern established by batches 1-8):
- `packages/frontend/data/licks/chris-adler.js`
- `packages/frontend/data/licks/art-cruz.js`
- `packages/frontend/data/licks/alex-bent.js`

LLM companion files:
- `public/llms/licks/chris-adler.md`
- `public/llms/licks/art-cruz.md`
- `public/llms/licks/alex-bent.md`

Sitemap auto-derives from `SIGNATURE_LICKS` — no manual sitemap edit required.

## Quality gate (per lick page)

- ≥ 200 words describing the technique, timing, gear used
- Tab/notation description or step-by-step breakdown
- ≥ 2 internal links (drummer profile + album article where lick originates)
- BPM, time signature, difficulty level metadata
- LLM companion includes all 3 licks for the drummer in plain English

## Estimated organic uplift

Proven format: Igor Cavalera lick pages ("igor cavalera refuse resist double bass" and "igor cavalera roots bloody roots tribal groove") are top-2 GA4 organic pages (9 views and 6 views in last 7d). Replicating across 3 more drummers creates 9 new rankable long-tail URLs targeting "[drummer] drum lick" and "[drummer] [song] drum pattern" queries.

## Verify

1. All 9 lick page slugs appear in sitemap.xml
2. 3 LLM files live at `/llms/licks/chris-adler.md`, `/llms/licks/art-cruz.md`, `/llms/licks/alex-bent.md`
3. Hub pages `/drummers/chris-adler/licks`, `/drummers/art-cruz/licks`, `/drummers/alex-bent/licks` render correctly
4. Each individual lick page ≥ 200 words
5. Internal links on each page resolve (no 404s to drummer profile or album article)

## Done

9 lick pages live + 3 LLM files committed + hub pages updated for all 3 drummers.
title: SEO batch: Lick pages batch 9 — Chris Adler + Art Cruz + Alex Bent (~9 lick pages + 3 LLM files — LoG succession + Trivium momentum)
